emails.subject: Out of the office
emails.body: Out of the office I will be out of the office at a seminar on Thursday and Friday of this week.

emails.subject: Out of the office
emails.body: Out of the office Just a reminder I will be out of the office tomorrow, Wednesday the 25th. I am also planning on being out of the office on November 7th. Please reach me early today if you need anything by tomorrow. I will be back in the office early on Thursday.
